description_long: This is a brown paper grocery bag with a slightly crumpled, soft appearance and a rectangular base. The front of the bag features a pink oval label with the word 'Sugar' written in white, surrounded by a dashed border. The top of the bag is open, revealing a white granular substance inside, suggesting it is filled with sugar. The bag has no visible handles and the sides and back are plain, with subtle shading indicating folds and creases typical of paper bags. The overall shape is slightly bulged, indicating it is partially filled. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, consistent with kraft paper material.
description: A brown paper grocery bag labeled 'Sugar' with a pink oval label, open at the top and partially filled with a white substance. The bag is soft, crumpled, and lacks handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pink 'Sugar' label and the open top with white contents visible.
description_view_1: Side view with no label, showing the bag's plain brown surface and open top.
description_view_2: Back view, plain brown with no markings, showing the bag's bulged shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with plain brown surface and open top.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Pink oval label with the word 'Sugar' in white handwritten text.
